title_header: THIS EPISODE CONTAINS DEPICTIONS OF VIOLENCE THAT MAY BE UPSETTING FOR SOME READERS. Episode 5 Chapter 1 The Beginning of the Paywall Part 4

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: SMOKE...?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHERE IS IT COMING FROM?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: AGH! WHAT THE HELL?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: F*CK!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT'S YOUR PROBLEM?!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It may have seemed like I had pushed Namwoon Kim to calm the scene again.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But that wasn't the only thing I had been aiming for.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT ARE YOU DOING? KEEP GOING! KILL HER!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHERE IS IT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: TURN IT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: IT MUST BE AROUND HERE SOMEWHERE.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: FOUND IT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: EXCUSE ME.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HERE. HOLD ON TO THIS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: UGH!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: PLEASE STOP WHAT YOU'RE DOING!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: KILLING THAT OLD LADY DOESN'T MEAN YOU'RE GOING TO LIVE!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: W-WHAT?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Good. I have their attention.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: LET'S SAY WE KILL THE OLD LADY. WHAT NEXT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YES, IF THAT OLD LADY DIES, WE WILL BE ABLE TO BUY SOME TIME BECAUSE WE KILLED SOMETHING WITHIN THE GIVEN TIME LIMIT. BUT WHAT WILL HAPPEN NEXT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: IF WHAT THE DOKKAEBI SAID IS TRUE, IT MEANS WE ALL HAVE TO KILL ONE PERSON EACH. SO WHO WILL YOU KILL NEXT? WILL YOU KILL ALL THE PEOPLE BESIDE YOU?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HA!

dialogue.speaker: NAMWOON KIM
dialogue.line: ISN'T IT OBVIOUS? HE HE. WE'LL KILL LOSERS LIKE YOU NEXT!

dialogue.speaker: NAMWOON KIM
dialogue.line: NO NEED TO WORRY ABOUT YOUR TURN BEFOREHAND. THE CHANCES ARE FIFTY-FIFTY ANYWAYS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: NAMWOON KIM...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Yes. I knew you would say that.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHY GAMBLE WITH OUR LIVES... WHEN THERE'S A WAY TO SURVIVE THIS WITHOUT BECOMING A MURDERER?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT? HOW?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HAVE YOU FORGOTTEN?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE SCENARIO DIDN'T SAY... WE HAVE TO KILL A HUMAN BEING.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: IT SAID WE HAVE TO KILL ONE OR MORE LIVING ORGANISMS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: INSECTS?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OF COURSE! IF WE KILL ONE OF THOSE...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The madness that had driven them to kill the old lady now came hurtling toward me.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But why...? Why is my heart beating with joy in this precarious situation? Why am I smiling? Was I always this kind of person?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THAT CRAZY...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: AH...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [THE FIRST KILL MISSION HAS BEEN ACCOMPLISHED!]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU WILL RECEIVE 100 COINS AS A BONUS!]

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: F-FIND IT! YOU ASSHOLE! JUST YOU WAIT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I GOT IT! AH!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THERE ARE... THREE MINUTES LEFT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY YOU, WHY DID YOU DO THAT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YOU COULD'VE JUST HANDED OVER THE BUGS.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: There were only three insects left in the box.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: NAMWOON KIM
dialogue.line: HAHA HAHA! SO YOU THREW THEM SINCE NOT ALL OF US CAN LIVE?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YES.

dialogue.speaker: NAMWOON KIM
dialogue.line: HAHAHA! DON'T BE RIDICULOUS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: NO ONE IN THEIR RIGHT MIND WOULD PULL A STUNT LIKE THIS FOR THAT KIND OF STUPID REASON. BE HONEST. YOU JUST WANTED TO WATCH THEM FIGHT FOR THEIR LIVES, DIDN'T YOU?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Yes. Namwoon Kim is that kind of guy. He's cruel and rampant and enjoys situations like this.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: VANG [PERSONAL SKILL: CHARACTER PROFILE ACTIVATED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [CHARACTER PROFILE] NAMWOON KIM AGE: 19 SUPPORTING CONSTELLATION: NONE (TWO CONSTELLATIONS ARE CURRENTLY INTERESTED IN THIS INDIVIDUAL) PERSONAL ATTRIBUTE: EDGELORD (GENERIC) PERSONAL SKILLS: [EXCEPTIONAL ADAPTABILITY LV. 3], [KNIFE FIGHTING LV: 1] [GRIMDARK AWAKENING LV: 1] OVERALL STATS: [STAMINA LV. 3], [STRENGTH LV. 4], [AGILITY LV: 6], [MANA LV. 4] GENERAL EVALUATION: A TEENAGE EDGELORD WHOSE DARK SIDE HAS AWAKENED DUE TO AN EXTRANEOUS EVENT. IT'S BEST TO NOT GET INVOLVED WITH HIM.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: CHARACTER PROFILE?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I see... I think I know what my attributes are. Yeah, a bit of an edgelord.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Most teen edgelords in TWSA couldn't handle the nightmare that became reality and committed suicide. But Namwoon Kim was different.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: DELUSIONAL DEMON NAMWOON KIM. This boy, who would later be bestowed with that fitting nickname, was no ordinary edgelord. He had been waiting for the apocalypse for a long time... and he adapted to this world at an unusual speed. And right now... that delusional demon...

dialogue.speaker: NAMWOON KIM
dialogue.line: TEAM UP WITH ME.

dialogue.speaker: NAMWOON KIM
dialogue.line: WHAT DO YOU SAY?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: VANG [NAMWOON KIM HAS EXPRESSED INTEREST IN YOU]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: VING [YOUR UNDERSTANDING OF NAMWOON KIM HAS INCREASED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: wants to join forces with me.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MAIN SCENARIO #1 [PROVE YOUR VALUE] KILL ONE OR MORE LIVING ORGANISMS. CATEGORY: MAIN DIFFICULTY: F TIME LIMIT: 10 MINUTES REWARD: 300 COINS PENALTY FOR FAILURE: DEATH. TIME REMAINING: 2 MINUTES 59 SECONDS.

summary: The protagonist intervenes in a violent scenario, revealing a loophole in the 'kill one living organism' mission by suggesting killing insects instead of humans. Namwoon Kim, initially advocating for killing 'losers,' is intrigued by the protagonist's cunning and proposes a team-up, while the protagonist reflects on Namwoon Kim's dark nature and their own surprising joy in the chaotic situation.
